page.title: Projects
page.subtitle: A selection of things I’ve built to explore systems, learning, and real-world problems.

featuredStack.title: Featured
featuredStack.description: Three projects that best represent how I think and build.

projects.title: ShopNSplit
projects.description: A full-stack grocery cost-splitting app that uses OCR and AI validation to turn receipts into accurate shared payments.

projects.title: Viva
projects.description: A real-time voice tutoring system that guides students through assignments using low-latency audio and Socratic AI prompting.

projects.title: WriteLight
projects.description: A collaborative vocabulary learning platform built at a hackathon, focused on journaling, daily prompts, and clean frontend architecture.

projects.title: Spotify Wrapped Clone
projects.description: A data-driven recreation of Spotify Wrapped focused on visual storytelling and user listening insights.

projects.title: Multidoku
projects.description: A multiplayer Sudoku platform with real-time gameplay and custom puzzle generation.

projects.title: Proxy
projects.description: A voice-controlled browser that enables fast, command-based navigation without traditional UI friction.

projects.title: Screenly
projects.description: A productivity tracking tool that visualizes focus, habits, and time usage through dashboards.

projects.title: BriefAI
projects.description: An AI-powered summarization tool designed to condense long content into fast, readable briefs.

projects.title: LifeCents
projects.description: A personal finance tracker focused on awareness, budgeting, and long-term decision making.
